name: Falcon ADM General De Fondos SA - Fondo De Inversion Falcom Global  Equity Fund
summary: Falcon ADM General De Fondos SA - Fondo De Inversion Falcom Global Equity Fund invests in global equity markets. It is managed by Falcon ADM General De Fondos SA. The fund's objective is to achieve long-term capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of international stocks.
